ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., quarterback, wide receiver) */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "player_height" TEXT /* Player's height (e.g., 6'2") */,
  "player_weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight in pounds */,
  "player_college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "player_draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "player_draft_round" INTEGER /* Draft round */,
  "player_draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., active, injured, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "team_founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_capacity" INTEGER /* Stadium capacity */,
  "team_coach" TEXT /* Current head coach */,
  "team_owner" TEXT /* Team owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game (e.g., 24-17) */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the game belongs to */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff, exhibition) */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "game_attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators */,
  "game_weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the log entry belongs to */,
  "play_number" INTEGER /* Number of the play */,
  "play_type" TEXT /* Type of play (e.g., pass, run) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the play */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the game */,
  "down" INTEGER /* Down of the play */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance needed for a first down */,
  "yard_line" INTEGER /* Yard line the play started from */,
  "time_remaining" TEXT /* Time remaining in the quarter */,
  "play_result" TEXT /* Result of the play (e.g., touchdown, incomplete pass) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "receiving_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "receptions" INTEGER /* Number of receptions */,
  "yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained */,
  "tds" INTEGER /* Number of touchdowns */,
  "longest" INTEGER /* Longest reception */,
  "targeted" INTEGER /* Number of times the player was targeted */,
  "dropped_passes" INTEGER /* Number of passes dropped */,
  "yac" INTEGER /* Yards after catch */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles */,
  "longest_touchdown" INTEGER /* Longest touchdown reception */,
  "catch_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of passes caught */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_receiving_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_receiving_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rushing_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of rushing attempts */,
  "yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained */,
  "tds" INTEGER /* Number of touchdowns */,
  "longest" INTEGER /* Longest rush */,
  "longest_touchdown" INTEGER /* Longest touchdown rush */,
  "broken_tackles" INTEGER /* Number of broken tackles */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles */,
  "yards_per_attempt" TEXT /* Average yards per rushing attempt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rushing_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rushing_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passing_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of passing attempts */,
  "completions" INTEGER /* Number of completions */,
  "yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained */,
  "tds" INTEGER /* Number of touchdowns */,
  "ints" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions */,
  "longest_pass" INTEGER /* Longest pass thrown */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Number of sacks */,
  "sack_yards" INTEGER /* Yards lost due to sacks */,
  "interceptions_thrown" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions thrown */,
  "passer_rating" TEXT /* Passer rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passing_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passing_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year the season was played */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "number_of_weeks" INTEGER /* Number of weeks in the season */,
  "number_of_playoff_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the playoffs */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion team */,
  "mvp_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the MVP player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistic belongs to */,
  "receptions" INTEGER /* Number of receptions */,
  "yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained */,
  "tds" INTEGER /* Number of touchdowns */,
  "longest" INTEGER /* Longest reception */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started */,
  "targeted" INTEGER /* Number of times the player was targeted */,
  "dropped_passes" INTEGER /* Number of passes dropped */,
  "yac" INTEGER /* Yards after catch */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles */,
  "longest_touchdown" INTEGER /* Longest touchdown reception */,
  "catch_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of passes caught */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_rushing_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistic belongs to */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of rushing attempts */,
  "yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained */,
  "tds" INTEGER /* Number of touchdowns */,
  "longest" INTEGER /* Longest rush */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started */,
  "longest_touchdown" INTEGER /* Longest touchdown rush */,
  "broken_tackles" INTEGER /* Number of broken tackles */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles */,
  "yards_per_attempt" TEXT /* Average yards per rushing attempt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_rushing_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_rushing_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_passing_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistic belongs to */,
  "attempts" INTEGER /* Number of passing attempts */,
  "completions" INTEGER /* Number of completions */,
  "yards" INTEGER /* Total yards gained */,
  "tds" INTEGER /* Number of touchdowns */,
  "ints" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started */,
  "longest_pass" INTEGER /* Longest pass thrown */,
  "sacks" INTEGER /* Number of sacks */,
  "sack_yards" INTEGER /* Yards lost due to sacks */,
  "interceptions_thrown" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions thrown */,
  "passer_rating" TEXT /* Passer rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_passing_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_passing_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "active" INTEGER /* User account status (active or inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the system */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., game, player, team) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "report_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report in bytes */,
  "report_url" TEXT /* URL to access the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
